summary: A Go-based monolithic testing and validation framework utilizing MCP handlers, schema validation, and a runner-executor pattern, heavily supplemented by automated agent-generated tests.
concerns: High volume of agent-generated extra tests (0005-0019, 0025) suggests unstable core test coverage
Scattered test directories across GOrchestra/glm-agents paths indicate complex CI/agent orchestration overhead
Clean git status with only chore/documentation commits recently might mask pending uncommitted work
suggestions: Consolidate agent-generated extra tests into the main test suites to reduce maintenance burden
Review core test coverage in runner and schema packages to minimize need for external test generation
Focus on the MCP handlers integration as it appears to be a newer, evolving feature area
